'''鈭歡-t-b-zh''' ('''kagatbezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wailo|wailo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wailo|wailo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-t-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kagatbezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigatbezhoko|thigatbezhoko]] || [[word:jigatbezhoko|jigatbezhoko]] || [[word:shigatbezhoko|shigatbezhoko]] || [[word:kigatbezhoko|kigatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugatbezhoko|thuthugatbezhoko]] || [[word:jujugatbezhoko|jujugatbezhoko]] || [[word:shushugatbezhoko|shushugatbezhoko]] || [[word:kukugatbezhoko|kukugatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugatbezhoko|thugatbezhoko]] || [[word:jugatbezhoko|jugatbezhoko]] || [[word:shugatbezhoko|shugatbezhoko]] || [[word:kugatbezhoko|kugatbezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogatbezhoko|thogatbezhoko]] || [[word:jogatbezhoko|jogatbezhoko]] || [[word:shogatbezhoko|shogatbezhoko]] || [[word:kogatbezhoko|kogatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogatbezhoko|thogatbezhoko]] || [[word:jogatbezhoko|jogatbezhoko]] || [[word:shogatbezhoko|shogatbezhoko]] || [[word:kogatbezhoko|kogatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gatbezhoko|th忙gatbezhoko]] || [[word:j忙gatbezhoko|j忙gatbezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙gatbezhoko|sh忙gatbezhoko]] || [[word:k忙gatbezhoko|k忙gatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagatbezhoko|thathagatbezhoko]] || [[word:jajagatbezhoko|jajagatbezhoko]] || [[word:shashagatbezhoko|shashagatbezhoko]] || [[word:kakagatbezhoko|kakagatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagatbezhoko|thagatbezhoko]] || [[word:jagatbezhoko|jagatbezhoko]] || [[word:shagatbezhoko|shagatbezhoko]] || [[word:kagatbezhoko|kagatbezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagatbezhoko|thagatbezhoko]] || [[word:jagatbezhoko|jagatbezhoko]] || [[word:shagatbezhoko|shagatbezhoko]] || [[word:kagatbezhoko|kagatbezhoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
